$comment: Quill branding + theme config. Edit this file to rebrand for your fork — rebuild required (npm run build). All fields are optional; missing fields fall back to Quill defaults.
name: Quill
defaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant.
$themesExample: Each theme overrides every CSS custom property the app uses. category is 'dark' or 'light'. swatches is a 3-color preview shown in the Settings picker. Theme id must be a slug.
